heading: Omitted
label: 80 to 83 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections were omitted in the general reorganization of this chapter by , , .Pub. L. 90–487, § 182 Stat. 761Aug. 15, 1968Section 80, , pt. B, § 7 (part), , provided for revocation and suspension of licenses issued by the Secretary of Agriculture. See .act Aug. 11, 1916, ch. 31339 Stat. 484section 85 of this titleSection 81, , pt. B, § 7 (part), , prohibited the existence of an interest, financial or otherwise, direct or indirect, on the part of inspectors in grain elevators or warehouses or in the merchandising of grain. See .act Aug. 11, 1916, ch. 31339 Stat. 484section 87 of this titleSection 82, , pt. B, § 7 (part), , required maintenance of records and reports by inspectors. See .act Aug. 11, 1916, ch. 31339 Stat. 484section 87a of this titleSection 83, , pt. B, § 7 (part), , called for a semiannual report by the Secretary of Agriculture on the delivery of grain in the nation.act Aug. 11, 1916, ch. 31339 Stat. 484
